# Jenny Faye Alipen — Customer Success & Operations Specialist

> Personal portfolio of Jenny Faye Alipen, a remote Customer Success & Operations Specialist based in Iloilo City, Philippines, with 10+ years of experience across customer support, customer retention, operations, administrative support, and property management. Available for full-time remote roles; 5.0-rated on Upwork.

Key facts:

- 10+ years of fully remote experience across US and European companies
- Roles held: Customer Retention Specialist (Scandinavian BioLabs), Property Manager Assistant (Hatch Property Management), Customer Service Representative (Gear Elevation, 6 years; SmileKit Dental Aligners), CSR promoted to Product Trainer (Walmart E-commerce)
- Industries: e-commerce, property management, healthcare, telecommunications, retail, customer retention, sales
- Two verified 5.0-star Upwork client reviews; endorsed as "Reliable"
- Education: BS Information Technology, ABE International Business College
